title: referrals — authorization policies
description: Five policies, one per owned entity. Admin-heavy — most write actions require owner/admin/marketing role. User plane exposes read-own + invitation-send only. Every ability defers to spatie/laravel-permission for the permission check; scope narrowing runs via the ResolveScope middleware (tenant + optional branch context — though this module is not branch-scoped, so the branch narrow is a no-op).

abilities.scope: admin + marketing + owner
admin + marketing + owner
admin + marketing + owner
admin + marketing + owner
admin + owner only — audit-critical
admin + owner
admin + marketing + owner
admin + owner only
admin + marketing + owner see everything. Users see only their own via /me/referral-code (separate endpoint).
owner + admin + marketing; user_scoped codes visible to the owning user
admin + marketing + owner (for campaign codes). User codes auto-issued via IssueReferralCodeJob (no direct create permission needed)
admin + marketing + owner
admin + owner only. Codes with any usage cannot be deleted (retention window applies)
admin + marketing + support: cross-tenant view of all referrals. Users see own via /me/referrals separately.
admin + marketing + the referrer + the referred
admin + marketing + owner. Refuses on already-terminal referrals.
Enterprise-only via `referrals_manual_override` entitlement + admin/owner. Audit-critical — records the reason.
Platform-plane force-vest for support intervention. Bypasses tenant guards. Notifies tenant admin + writes audit row with 7-year retention.
admin + marketing + support. Users see own via /me/referral-rewards.
recipient + admin + marketing
admin + owner only. Financial reversal — audit-critical. Every clawback fires ReferralClawback + notifies Finance.
Platform support intervention. Emits notification to tenant admin + writes audit row.
admin + support only. Fraud data is highly sensitive.
admin + support
admin only. Sets disposition. Every review is compliance-audited (7-year retention).
Enterprise-only via `referrals_manual_override` entitlement + admin. Manual override that permits a flagged referral to proceed.
